title: stevia gilliesii
intro: Stevia gilliesii, also known as the sweetroot or honey leaf, is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is native to Western Australia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Stevia gilliesii has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, digestive problems, and respiratory infections, offering benefits like reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and enhanced immune function. The herbal preparations of Stevia gilliesii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
